MPCurver 0.2.1
  • Reference
    • Getting started
    • Getting Started with MPCurver CAVI
    • Feature Partitioning with MPCurver
    • Case studies
    • Analyzing the eLife Fitness Dataset with MPCurver

Package index

Model fitting

fit_mpcurve()
Fit an MPCurve model with the public CAVI interface
do_mpcurve()
Continue CAVI iterations on an existing mpcurve fit
fitted_prior()
Extract fitted prior values

Inspection and visualization

print(<mpcurve>)
Print an mpcurve fit
summary(<mpcurve>) print(<summary.mpcurve>)
Summarise an mpcurve model fit
plot(<mpcurve>)
Plot an mpcurve model fit

Ordering helpers

PCA_ordering()
PCA ordering (PC1)
fiedler_ordering()
Fiedler ordering from a kNN graph
isomap_ordering()
Landmark Isomap ordering (no vegan; avoids O(n^2) dist matrix)
pcurve_ordering()
Principal curve ordering
tSNE_ordering()
t-SNE ordering

Simulation helpers

simulate_cavi_toy()
Simulate a toy dataset from the current single-ordering CAVI model
simulate_dual_trajectory()
Simulate a dual-trajectory dataset with configurable trajectory families
simulate_intrinsic_trajectories()
Simulate a multi-ordering intrinsic-trajectory dataset
simulate_spiral2d()
Simulate a 2D Archimedean spiral (helix-like) with noise
simulate_swiss_roll_1d_2d()
Simulate a 2D "swiss roll" spiral with a 1D latent parameter
simulate_two_order_gp_dataset()
Simulate a two-ordering GP dataset (Matern) for feature partitioning

On this page

Developed by Ziang Zhang.
